content.body: Is there any policy from TC39 to not use AI to take notes on Numeric meetings? We had this discussion on Modules Harmony meeting a while ago, but the blocker was that we couldn't find any member to host the meeting with such feature enabled, and I'm wondering if this is the case for Numeric calls or if it is something else.

I don't think there's a TC39-level prohibition against this for mostly-informal working groups like Numerics. Not sure about task groups like TG2. In TG1 plenary, the rules are more strict, mostly driven by individual delegates working under personal and company constraints. It's worth making an item to ask about this in next week's meeting, though, since you get on the hook a lot for taking notes and this would make your workflow easier
